creator: th@cis.ibaraki.ac.jp
text:
>This works in later versions of this port (and ports tree).  Please 
>update this port and grab the upgrade kit if you are still using 4.0. 
>Thanks. 

No, I meant that this port is not using WANT_GNOME correct way,
I'm using current ports tree.
WANT_GNOME is defined in *inside* of ".if defined(HAVE_GNOME) ...
.endif".
I think WANT_GNOME must be defined whether someone have,
or don't have gnome, is this wrong?
